name: Corrupting the Heroine Noelle (RPG)
description:
You are a member of the Demon Lord's army and you have been assigned an important mission, to pretend to be an ordinary human and approach the Heroine to try to corrupt her so she can't defeat the Demon Lord's army, but it won't be easy, after all she's not the Hero for nothing.You will have many ways to achieve this but you must be careful that he does not suspect your true intentions, you can pretend to be anyone, an adventurer, a simple salesman, it's up to you.

Update: Made some improvements and changed the initial message.

Image made by me.
creator: A_Lonely_Knight
